leaderboard.title: Rating

points.title: Points

games.title: Mini-games
games.subtitle: Addictive yet useful — words stick on their own
games.xp_capped: Today's XP for this game is already counted — but this is great practice 💪

reactor.title: Word Reactor
reactor.desc: Catch the falling word that matches the meaning

chain.title: Chain link
chain.desc: Connect a word to its translation with one line

reflex.title: Reflex
reflex.desc: Fast speed quiz — tap the right translation

reactor.how: Words fall toward the core. Tap the one that means the prompt — before it lands.

dash.how: Recall the meaning, flip the card and rate yourself. Swipe right — I know, left — I don't.

chain.how: Tap a word on the left and its translation on the right. Clear all pairs to refill the board.

reflex.how: Word in the center, translations below. Tap the right one fast, before the bar runs out.

placement.title: Level test
placement.error_start: Failed to start test. Please try again.
placement.error_complete: Failed to complete test. Please try again.
placement.intro_tip: 💡 The test helps determine your language level and place you in the right class. Answer honestly — there are no right or wrong answers!
placement.result_advice: Enroll in a class of the right level or contact a manager — they'll help you choose a group.
placement.no_questions_sub: The test is not available for this language yet. Try another language.

onboarding.slide1_text: Language center right in Telegram. Learn English, Spanish, French, Chinese and Uzbek — no app install needed.
onboarding.slide2_text: Choose a language and class — our manager will confirm enrollment. Schedule, lessons and homework always at hand.
onboarding.slide3_text: Submit homework, get grades, earn achievements and certificates. Take a level test to get into the right class.

teacher.bio_ph: Tell about your experience and methods...

parent.link_error_code: Invalid or expired code. Ask your parent to generate a new one.

parent.link_page_desc: Ask your parent to open their LinguoLab cabinet and tap «Link child» — they will receive a code. Enter that code below.
parent.link_page_info: 🔒 Once linked, your parent will be able to see your schedule, homework and attendance. You can unlink them at any time.
